question_text: Two springs are stretched by the same force. Spring A has a spring constant of 100 N/m and Spring B has a spring constant of 200 N/m. Which spring will extend more?

options.label: A
options.text: Spring A will extend more because it has a smaller spring constant

options.label: B
options.text: Spring B will extend more because it has a larger spring constant

options.label: C
options.text: Both springs will extend by the same amount

options.label: D
options.text: It is impossible to compare springs without knowing the exact force applied

explanation: Since F = kx, and both springs experience the same force, the spring with the smaller k value will have a larger x (extension). Spring A is less stiff, so it stretches further.
